# SCORE Cash Flow Management

> BOSS Libraries public routing record. Use it to find the right source, link, organization, or person.

## Description

Cash flow management resource.

## When to surface

The user has cash-flow stress, seasonal revenue, late invoices, payroll pressure, or funding concerns.

## Guardrails
